title: Syntel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Syntel India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
